name: Blue Cheese Chips
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb (8 ounces) blue cheese, broken into small pieces
1 stick (8 tablespoons) butter or margarine, softened
1/4 cup buckwheat groats or chopped toasted nuts of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream the butter and cheese together in a food processor, or in a large bowl using a pastry blender or two forks.
3. In another bowl, stir together the flour, buckwheat groats or nuts (if desired), and pepper.
4. Add the flour mixture to the butter-cheese mixture and blend well.
5. Blend in the milk, little by little, to form a dough that will hold together in a cohesive ball. The dough should be quite stiff.
6. Divide it into 2 equal portions for rolling.
7. On a floured surface or pastry cloth, roll out to about 3/16 inch thick.
8. Cut into 1-1/2-inch circles and place on an ungreased baking sheet, making sure the edges do not touch.
9. Prick each cracker in 1 or 2 places with the tines of a fork.
10. Bake for 15 minutes, turn, and bake for an additional 5 to 10 minutes, or until medium brown.
